title: Char Dham Yatra 2026 Complete Travel Guide
excerpt: A practical guide to Char Dham Yatra routes, best season, package options, helicopter choices and planning tips from CareMyTrip.
content: The Char Dham Yatra covers Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath and Badrinath. Most travellers choose May to June or September to October for better weather and smoother road movement. CareMyTrip plans road-based packages from Haridwar and Delhi, plus helicopter itineraries from Dehradun for travellers who want a shorter and more comfortable journey. A good itinerary should account for altitude, weather buffers, hotel quality, vehicle condition and darshan support. Families and senior citizens should keep the pace relaxed and avoid very long back-to-back driving days where possible.
metaTitle: Char Dham Yatra 2026 Guide | Routes, Cost, Best Time
metaDescription: Plan Char Dham Yatra 2026 with routes, best time, road and helicopter package tips from CareMyTrip.

title: Kedarnath and Badrinath Do Dham Yatra Planning Guide
excerpt: How to plan a Do Dham Yatra covering Kedarnath and Badrinath from Haridwar, Delhi or Dehradun.
content: Do Dham Yatra is ideal for travellers who want to visit Kedarnath and Badrinath without covering the full Char Dham circuit. Common starting points are Haridwar, Delhi and Dehradun. The journey usually includes Guptkashi or Sonprayag for Kedarnath and Joshimath, Pipalkoti or Badrinath for the Badrinath side. Travellers should plan for Kedarnath trek arrangements, helicopter availability, weather buffers and comfortable overnight halts. CareMyTrip packages can be customized for families, senior citizens, small groups and private vehicles.
metaTitle: Do Dham Yatra Guide | Kedarnath Badrinath Packages
metaDescription: Plan Kedarnath and Badrinath Do Dham Yatra with route, duration and package advice from CareMyTrip.

title: Best Kerala Tour Package Itinerary for Families and Couples
excerpt: Explore Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey and Kovalam with a Kerala itinerary designed for comfort and value.
content: A balanced Kerala tour combines hill stations, wildlife, backwaters and beaches. Munnar is best for tea gardens and cool weather, Thekkady is known for spice plantations and Periyar, Alleppey offers houseboat stays, and Kovalam adds a relaxed beach finish. Families usually prefer private vehicles and well-paced sightseeing, while couples often choose boutique stays and houseboat experiences. CareMyTrip can build Kerala packages around budget, hotel category and travel dates.
metaTitle: Best Kerala Tour Package Itinerary | Munnar Alleppey Kovalam
metaDescription: Kerala tour planning guide covering Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey, Kovalam, family trips and honeymoon packages.

title: Auli and Harsil Travel Guide for Uttarakhand Holidays
excerpt: A quick guide to two scenic Uttarakhand holidays: Auli for snow and Harsil for quiet Himalayan stays.
content: Auli is popular for snow views, ropeway rides and winter holidays, while Harsil is a peaceful Himalayan village known for apple orchards, riverside walks and proximity to Gangotri. Both destinations work well for travellers who want mountain scenery without a typical crowded city break. Travel planning should consider season, road conditions, hotel availability and buffer time. CareMyTrip offers road and helicopter-assisted options for selected Uttarakhand routes.
